title: Effortless Creamy Russian Pork Skillet
description: A quick, salty and creamy pork skillet with a hint of ground cloves and pickles that keeps calories low.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
Add the ground pork to the skillet, breaking it apart with a spoon, and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Season with ground cloves, paprika, salt, and pepper, stirring to combine.
Pour in the low-fat sour cream and stir until the mixture is creamy and coats the pork, about 2 minutes.
Fold in the sliced pickles and chopped dill, cooking for another minute to heat through.
Serve hot with a side of steamed greens or a fresh salad.
Enjoy your low-calorie, creamy Russian pork skillet!
